# data/church — generated datasets

**Do not edit by hand.** These files are built and distributed from
`church/datasets/` at the workspace parent level. To refresh:

```
cd ~/src/church/datasets
uv run build.py
uv run distribute.py
```

`MANIFEST.json` records the content version of each dataset present here.
See `church/datasets/registry.yaml` for what each dataset is and where it
comes from.
